title: TOTEM LODGE - 211info
text: NARA NW TOTEM LODGE TOTEM LODGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides physical health, mental health, addictions treatment, and outreach services. Care is provided by a team of primary care providers, mental health providers, case managers, care coordinators, certified addictions counselors, psychiatric providers, and medical assistants. 1438 SE Division Street Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as Native American or Alaskan Native Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 307-7775 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 307-7775 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: Integrated Co-Occurring Disorders Treatment * Native American Community Integrated Physical/Mental Health Services * Native American Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NARA NW TOTEM LODGE
